---
title: "Calculate Indicators"
output: # html_notebook
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

# R Set-up

```{r}
# Clear workspace
rm(list = ls())

# Libraries 
library(terra)
library(here)
library(purrr)
library(dplyr)
library(tigris)
library(sf)
library(aws.s3)

# Authenticate aws
source(here::here('aws_cred.R'))

# Base S3 location (GDAL-style path)
s3_base <- "/vsis3/sagemaker-gst-stage.sharing/ciara-hovis/TomoPrairie/bd_data"

dat.dir <- file.path(s3_base, "raw")
roi.dir <- file.path(s3_base, "studyarea")
dum.dir <- file.path(s3_base, "dummy")
ind.dir <- file.path(s3_base, "indicators")

```

# Data

## 0.1 Indicator Data
```{r}
# Find matching GeoPackage files
objs <- get_bucket(
  bucket = "sagemaker-gst-stage.sharing",
  prefix = "ciara-hovis/TomoPrairie/bd_data/indicators/"
)

gpkg_files <- paste0(
  "/vsis3/sagemaker-gst-stage.sharing/",
  sapply(objs, `[[`, "Key")
)

gpkg_files <- gpkg_files[grepl("\\.gpkg$", gpkg_files)]

vectors <- lapply(gpkg_files, vect)

```


## 0.2 Dummy Data

```{r}
dum_base <- rast(file.path(dum.dir, "eccc_reclass_reproj_algn_binary.tif"))
dum_base <- rast(file.path(dum.dir, "gpw_reproj_algn_natseminat_noshrub_masked.tif"))
dum_fut <- rast(file.path(dum.dir, "AAFC_LUTS_2020_5-classes.tif"))

# plot(dum_base)
# plot(dum_fut)

roi3 <- vect(file.path(roi.dir, "modelling_study_area_aligned_cnvc_Jan2026.shp"))

```


# Calc indicators

```{r}
# ---- Progress logging setup ----

log_file <- here::here(
  "logs",
  paste0("indicator_progress_studyarea_", format(Sys.time(), "%Y%m%d_%H%M%S"), ".log")
)

dir.create(dirname(log_file), showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

log_msg <- function(msg) {
  timestamp <- format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
  cat(sprintf("[%s] %s\n", timestamp, msg),
      file = log_file,
      append = TRUE)
}

log_msg("Starting indicator calculation")
log_msg(paste("Number of vectors:", length(vectors)))
```


```{r}
# Enable parallel processing inside terra
terraOptions(cores = parallel::detectCores())

pb <- txtProgressBar(min = 0, max = length(vectors), style = 3)

results <- vector("list", length(vectors))

for (i in seq_along(vectors)) {

  v <- vectors[[i]]
  log_msg(sprintf("Indicator %d: started", i))

  res <- tryCatch({

    # Dissolve all features into ONE polygon
    v_one <- aggregate(v)

    log_msg(sprintf(
      "Indicator %d: dissolved to %d feature(s)",
      i, nrow(v_one)
    ))

    # Count 1-valued pixels
    pix_sum <- extract(
      dum_base,
      v_one,
      fun = sum,
      na.rm = TRUE
    )

    pix_val <- pix_sum[, 2]

    log_msg(sprintf(
      "Indicator %d: pixel count = %s",
      i, pix_val
    ))

    # ✅ Return TABULAR result
    data.frame(
      indicator_id = i,
      pixel_ones   = pix_val,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )

  }, error = function(e) {

    log_msg(sprintf(
      "Indicator %d: ERROR - %s",
      i, e$message
    ))

    NULL
  })

  results[[i]] <- res
  setTxtProgressBar(pb, i)
  log_msg(sprintf("Indicator %d: finished", i))
}

close(pb)

log_msg("Indicator calculation completed")

```

```{r}
indicators_studyarea_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(results)
```


```{r}
# Write local temp CSV
tmp_csv <- tempfile(fileext = ".csv")

write.csv(
  indicators_studyarea_df,
  tmp_csv,
  row.names = FALSE
)

# Upload to S3
aws.s3::put_object(
  file   = tmp_csv,
  bucket = "sagemaker-gst-stage.sharing",
  object = "ciara-hovis/TomoPrairie/results/indicators_studyarea_pixel_counts2.csv"
)

log_msg("Saved indicators_studyarea_pixel_counts.csv to S3")
```
